REVISION of sequence of Title for Earls Marischal

events.name: Sat in Parliament as Master of Keith
Sat in Parliament as Earl Marischal
Aided King James III in raising an army to suppress insurgent barons
Took concerted measures with those is South of Scotland who were against the Government
Was made Commander of the Scottish forces along with Earls of Argyll, Huntly, Crawford and Lord Lovatt
Entertained King James IV at Dunnottar
Took part in the campaign against the Highlands, which ended in the capture of the notorious Donald Dhu.
Attended the Parliament called by King James IV. in 1510.
Is said to have commanded at the Battle of Flodden Field (per Pitscottie)
Death of Child

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal於1455年出生在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾登諾塔時，他的父親William Keith 1st Earl Marischal30歲，母親Muriella Mariota Erskine25歲。他於1482年1月11日與Lady Elizabeth Gordon在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1530年11月24日在他的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭金加迪爾登諾塔。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal于1455年出生在英国苏格兰金加迪爾登諾塔时，他的父亲William Keith 1st Earl Marischal30岁，母亲Muriella Mariota Erskine25岁。他于1482年1月11日与Lady Elizabeth Gordon在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1530年11月24日在他的家乡享年75岁，埋葬在苏格兰金加迪爾登諾塔。

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal was born in 1455, in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William Keith 1st Earl Marischal, was 30 and his mother, Muriella Mariota Erskine, was 25. He married Lady Elizabeth Gordon on 11 January 1482, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 24 November 1530, in his hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland.

fr.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: Perth, Perth and Kinross, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal est né en 1455, à Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Keith 1st Earl Marischal, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Muriella Mariota Erskine, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Gordon le 11 janvier 1482, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 24 novembre 1530, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Écosse.

de.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: Perth, Perth and Kinross, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal 1455 in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Keith 1st Earl Marischal 30 und seine Mutter Muriella Mariota Erskine 25. Er hat am 11. Januar 1482 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Elizabeth Gordon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 24. November 1530 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal è nato il nel 1455 nel Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Keith 1st Earl Marischal, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Muriella Mariota Erskine, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Gordon il 11 gennaio 1482, nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 novembre 1530, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischalが1455年にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアダノッタルで生まれた時，父William Keith 1st Earl Marischalは30歳，母Muriella Mariota Erskineは25歳であった。1482年1月11日にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーでLady Elizabeth Gordonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1530年11月24日に故郷で75歳で死去し，スコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアダノッタルにて埋葬された。

ko.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 퍼스
ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal(이)가 1455년 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르 던타르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Keith 1st Earl Marischal(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Muriella Mariota Erskine(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1482년 1월 11일 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 Lady Elizabeth Gordon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1530년 11월 24일 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 킨카딘실르 던타르에 묻혔다.

pt.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: Perth, Perth and Kinross, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal nasceu em 1455, em Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Keith 1st Earl Marischal, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Muriella Mariota Erskine, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Gordon em 11 de janeiro de 1482, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de novembro de 1530, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland.

ro.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: пирт, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal родился в 1455 г. в местности дунноттар, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Keith 1st Earl Marischal было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Muriella Mariota Erskine, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Gordon 11 января 1482 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 24 ноября 1530 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности дунноттар, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия.

es.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: Perth, Perth and Kinross, Escocia, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal nació en 1455, en Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William Keith 1st Earl Marischal, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Muriella Mariota Erskine, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Gordon el 11 de enero de 1482, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de noviembre de 1530, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland.
